summary: RTW Verification Source Logic Verified. All 23 backend tests passed. Frontend verification successful. RTW expiry_date is now correctly sourced from right_to_work_check (verification) NOT right_to_work_documents. Time-limited employees show 'Verified (Time-Limited)' with verification expiry date and days countdown. Permanent employees show 'Verified (Permanent)' with 'No Expiry'.

issues: Runtime error overlay appears on page load (webpack-dev-server-client-overlay) - does not affect functionality but should be investigated

passed_tests: ✅ expiry_date comes from verification record (right_to_work_check), NOT documents
✅ permission_type is derived from verification expiry_date presence
✅ days_remaining correctly calculated from verification expiry
✅ is_blocking is False for verified RTW
✅ status_band is 'current' for valid RTW (>60 days)
✅ Time-limited card shows verification expiry, not document expiry
✅ Permanent card shows 'Permanent - No Expiry' correctly
✅ Frontend RTW card displays correctly for Olakunle: 'Verified (Time-Limited)' with 'Expires: 5/13/2028 (775d)'
✅ Frontend RTW card displays correctly for Henrietta: 'Verified (Permanent)' with 'Permanent - No Expiry'
critical_code_review_comments: RTW logic correctly simplified: Verification record (right_to_work_check) is now the ONLY source for expiry_date, days_remaining, and permission_type
Documents collection (right_to_work_documents) is correctly used for evidence presence only
get_employee_rtw_summary() at line 1756 correctly implements the new logic
permission_type derivation: If verification has expiry_date → time_limited, if not → permanent (lines 1909-1914)
days_remaining calculation correctly uses verification expiry (lines 1919-1929)
Frontend RTW card correctly displays verification-sourced data
context_for_next_testing_agent: RTW Verification Source Logic verified. Key changes: 1) RTW expiry_date is now sourced from right_to_work_check (verification) NOT right_to_work_documents. 2) Documents = evidence only, Verification = operational/legal check we monitor. 3) permission_type derived from verification expiry presence: has expiry → time_limited, no expiry → permanent. Test employees: Olakunle Alonge (time-limited, 775 days), Ayomi Lori (time-limited, 182 days), Henrietta Omo-Igene (permanent, no expiry).

feature_verification.rtw_expiry_from_verification: VERIFIED - expiry_date comes from right_to_work_check, not right_to_work_documents
feature_verification.permission_type_derivation: VERIFIED - time_limited if verification has expiry_date, permanent if not
feature_verification.card_display: VERIFIED - shows verification expiry date, not document expiry date
feature_verification.days_remaining: VERIFIED - correctly calculated from verification expiry
